languages.text: На теле не видно заметных повреждений. Довольно необычно, учитывая обстоятельства.

traits.locale_text: На теле не видно заметных повреждений. Довольно необычно, учитывая обстоятельства.

languages.text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.
languages.original_text: На теле не видно заметных повреждений. Довольно необычно, учитывая обстоятельства.

traits.locale_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: Die Leiche weist keine sichtbaren Verletzungen auf, was angesichts der Umstände ungewöhnlich ist.
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: Il n'y a pas de blessures visibles sur le corps, ce qui est inhabituel compte tenu des circonstances.
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: 尸体上没有明显的伤痕，考虑到当时的情况，这很不寻常。
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: No hay lesiones visibles en el cuerpo, lo que es inusual teniendo en cuenta las circunstancias.
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: 遺体に目立った傷はなく、状況を考えれば珍しいことだ。
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.

languages.text: Vücudunda gözle görülür bir yara yok, ki bu da koşullar göz önüne alındığında alışılmadık bir durum.
languages.original_text: There are no visible injuries on the body, which is unusual considering the circumstances.
